Description: Lead Router Security - Tenant Isolation & Domain Bypass. Fix 4 CRITICAL/MEDIUM security issues: (1) scoreWithAI fire-and-forget uses raw ctx.prisma instead of prismaWithTenant - cross-tenant data leak risk [S2]. (2) logActivity $transaction uses raw ctx.prisma - may bypass tenant middleware [S3]. (3) bulkUpdateStatus uses direct Prisma updateMany bypassing Lead.changeStatus() domain validation - skips status transition rules and domain events [S4]. (4) getHotLeads/getReadyForQualification pass userId as ownerId without explicit tenantId [S9]. Fix: Replace ctx.prisma with prismaWithTenant in all cases. Route bulkUpdateStatus through domain model. Add explicit tenantId to hot/ready queries.
Definition of Done: All lead router procedures use prismaWithTenant; bulkUpdateStatus routes through Lead.changeStatus(); getHotLeads has explicit tenantId; tenant isolation integration tests pass; no raw ctx.prisma in lead router
KPIs: 0 raw ctx.prisma calls in lead.router.ts; tenant isolation test coverage >=90%

Description: Lead Detail Status Type Fix + Auth Guard. (2) leads/(list)/new/page.tsx missing useRequireAuth() hook - unauthenticated users can access create lead form [F1]. Also fix trpc vs api import inconsistency in create page [F8]. Fix: Add NEGOTIATING to LeadStatus type, add useRequireAuth() to create page, standardize import.
Definition of Done: LeadStatus includes all Prisma LeadStatusEnum values; create page has auth guard; no runtime crash for NEGOTIATING leads; trpc import standardized to api; tests >=90%
KPIs: 0 missing status values in LeadStatus type; auth guard present on /leads/new

(5) leadResponseSchema missing Lead 360 fields (aiInsight, activities, notes, files, tasks) [D5]. Fix: Explicitly handle status in update, unify thresholds, add sortBy enum, fix schema keys.
